prose: Frontier-orbital single-point calculation on benzene at DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard', PySCF RKS), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry taken from user-supplied .xyz file (not re-optimised at this level). SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy = true, all checks passed. HOMO = −7.0468329 eV (index 20), LUMO = −0.41574728 eV (index 21), HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.6310857 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap). Vertical IP = 7.0468 eV, vertical EA = 0.41575 eV. Total electronic energy = −232.33724 Hartree.
